name: Gobi Dal - Lentils with Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils well and drain.
2. Heat ghee or oil in a large saucepan.
3. Fry the onions until they soften.
4. Add chili, pepper, cumin, coriander, and turmeric; stir and cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add lentils, lemon juice, and cut cauliflower into small florets to the pan.
6. Add chicken stock and coconut; bring to a boil.
7. Simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Mix flour with some liquid to form a smooth paste; stir into the saucepan.
9. Add salt and cashews; cook an additional 5-10 minutes until lentils form a thick sauce.
10. Serve hot with plain boiled rice.
